corpus: VerbNet 3.3 (University of Colorado, cu-clear/verbnet, tag vn-3.3)
role: E2a PURE-DIAGNOSTIC input (maintainer decision #29): third-party selectional-restriction source used ONLY to MEASURE whether an amended O2 anomaly-gold construct could populate O2 cells on the CURRENT 4-lemma inventory. NOT adopted as gold; NOT a re-freeze; adoption admissibility is a maintainer decision (e0-kill-steering-synthesis.md, maintainer-owned section).
canonical_subset: cu-clear-verbnet-90f85a6/verbnet3.3/*.xml (329 class files) + verbnet3.3/vn_class-3.dtd. The zipball also carries verbnet-test/ and vn-gl/ variants; the diagnostic consumes ONLY the verbnet3.3/ set (the released 3.3 XML), stipulated in the mapping doc.
independence: VerbNet 3.3 predates the kernel-v1 corpus and the ENGINE-INF design; its class membership, thematic roles, and selectional restrictions were authored by third parties with no knowledge of this programme. Its member wn sense keys share WordNet sense identity with kernel-v1's synset keys (same identity-sharing disclosure as G1, design §2.1).
license_note: VerbNet 3.3 is distributed under the VerbNet 3.0 license (free for research use); pinned here unmodified for reproducibility.
